text: Worth every penny. Kartik didn’t just build a site; he built a system that doubled our leads in 30 days.
Our online revenue jumped 3x within 60 days of launch. Kartik’s system isn’t a website—it’s a revenue engine.
We replaced our entire manual follow-up team with Kartik’s automation. ROI was visible in the first week.
From concept to deployment in 14 days. The site now converts at 8.5%—triple our industry average.
Kartik built us a complete digital ecosystem—website, CRM integration, and AI chatbot. Our customer acquisition cost dropped by 40%.
